title: Rusted Chest
body: A chest sits in the corner, lid half-rusted shut.

title: Wandering Medic
body: A road medic has set up camp at the verge, supplies spread across a low stone.

title: Wandering Merchant
body: A merchant has arranged goods along a low wall.

title: Fallen Signpost
body: A battered signpost leans at the crossroads. Below the painted names, someone has scratched a fresh warning into the wood.

title: Roadside Shrine
body: A knee-high stone shrine stands at the road's edge, ringed with dried flowers and a copper coin.

title: Dry Well
body: The well has been dry for years. Something metal catches the light at the bottom.

title: Abandoned Camp
body: The embers are still warm. A pack sits open near the fire, abandoned mid-meal.

title: Stray Dog
body: A lean dog trots alongside the party for a quarter mile, watching your faces. It looks trained.

title: Road Patrol
body: A patrol of four armed men blocks the road, watching your approach with the practiced ease of people used to being obeyed.

title: Mercenary Camp
body: A camp of half a dozen mercenaries sits just off the road. They look bored but not hostile. For now.

title: Burned Farmhouse
body: The farmhouse roof has collapsed inward. Smoke still rises. A child crouches behind the garden wall, watching you.

title: Standing Stone
body: An ancient standing stone leans at the clearing's edge. It is warm to the touch even in cold air, and the warmth is not from the sun.

title: Broken Bridge
body: The bridge's center span has collapsed. The river runs chest-deep this time of year.

title: Fresh Mound
body: The ground here has been recently turned. The mound is too long, too wide, too fresh. Not a burial. An erasure.

title: Ember Idol
body: A stone figure the size of a child stands in a clearing. Its carved eyes glow faintly. Not with fire. With something older.

title: Wandering Sellsword
body: A grizzled sellsword on the road flags you down. Her last contract ended badly; she's looking for new blood.

title: Skeletal Wanderer
body: An animate skeleton crouches at the edge of a ruined shrine, bones polished smooth by long years. It makes no move to attack — just watches.
